FNV PPLIGHTING PASS ENTRY APPLY CONTRACT AUDIT

Questions:
1. What fields do BA8C50/BA8EC0 store in the 0x10-byte pass entry used by BA9EE0?
2. Which pass/list functions later consume those fields?
3. Where does the current NiD3DPass global feed shader binding versus texture binding?
4. Which function owns final D3D SetTexture calls for draw-time stages?
5. Can Psycho PBR rely on vanilla-bound textures at BSShader::SetShaders, or is another apply hook required?

======================================================================
Pass entry field layout under audit
======================================================================
  +0x00: pass/mode id byte/dword slot
  +0x04: short parameter slot written by BA9EE0
  +0x06: flag byte reset by BA9EE0
  +0x07: byte parameter slot written by BA9EE0
  +0x08: flag byte reset by BA9EE0 and special branch sets to 1
  +0x0B: flag byte reset by BA9EE0
  +0x0C: probable parameter/storage slot
  +0x10: pass entry object/list stride boundary
